metadata.title: Paste image Png to Jpeg
metadata.description: Paste image Png to Jpeg Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The smaller the Quality, the greater the compression ratio.
ast.target: 质量值越小，压缩率越高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically names the image with the name of the previous note +'-'+ the current timestamp + '.' + file type, for example, the image in test.md will be named test-1652261724173.jpeg
ast.target: 自动以前一个笔记的名称 + '-' + 当前时间戳 + '.' + 文件类型来命名图像，例如，test.md 中的图像将被命名为 test-1652261724173.jpeg
